channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Bank of Japan raises rates to 1% for first time since 1995
item.description: <![CDATA[Bank of Japan raises rates to 1% for first time since 1995]]>

item.title: Private equity bosses warn of AI threat to bets on law and accountancy

item.title: The peace deal is in the price: Goldman Sachs lowers its oil-price target to market levels

item.title: The world is more dangerous. Why is risk cheaper?

item.title: Europe’s AI champion Mistral vulnerable to Russian disinformation, study finds

item.title: The reclusive heirs in line for billions when Europe’s top tankmaker lists
